summary: Created MPI-148 — deferred Builder image v0.26.0 bump (follow-up to MPI-139).

Edits done+validated (JSON valid, SHA verified, changelog no-break). Remaining = user-triggered Pod CI rebuild + live gen verify + app portable swap. maturity -> validating.

Close condition staged: only blocker = one clean LTX i2v gen on v0.27. LTX OOM on 24GB is MPI-185 (24GB-inherent GGUF dequant spike, not a v0.27 regression). User running the decider now: LTX i2v on 32GB 5090 (cu128 image). Clean -> MPI-148 done.

LTX-2.3 i2v clean on v0.27 (32GB 5090, 85GB RAM, v0.11.0-cu128). 5s@1080p: preview 3:50 cold, finalize 57s, no OOM. Gen-verify complete: Wan5B+PiD (cu124) + LTX i2v (cu128). 24GB OOM = MPI-185 (headroom-inherent, not v0.27).

ComfyUI v0.26->v0.27 app+Pod bump COMPLETE. All 3 v0.11.0 images public+pull-verified; cpu smoke + CPU-Pod boot + GPU gen-verify (Wan/PiD/LTX) all pass. mpi-ci pushed; app pins local (54a62ce, 71da6a9 unpushed, push=user-op).
